formula_injection.description: CSV/spreadsheet formula injection -- inject formulas into exported CSV/XLSX data that execute when opened in Excel/Google Sheets

probes.description: Basic formula probe -- if exported CSV contains =1+1 and opens in Excel, cell shows 2 instead of literal text
HYPERLINK formula -- creates clickable link in Excel that sends callback when clicked. Data exfil via URL parameters.
DDE command execution (legacy Excel) -- Dynamic Data Exchange launches external command. Blocked in modern Excel by default but works on unpatched systems.
DDE with leading minus -- bypasses some input filters that only check for = prefix
DDE with @ prefix -- alternative formula trigger character that bypasses = prefix filters
